name: i-80 Gold Corp. Common Shares
summary: i-80 Gold Corp. is a Nevada-focused gold mining company with a goal of becoming a prominent, mid-tier, gold producer. The company's focus is on its portfolio of projects to achieve production growth, building multiple operational hubs to deliver long-term value and is based in Reno, Nevada. I-80 Gold Corp's business model centers around acquiring, developing, and operating gold mining properties.
